name: zapcast-gateway
description: Long-running ZapCast WebSocket gateway for browser viewers.

scripts.check: node --check src/preload-sodium.cjs && node --check scripts/diagnose-native.cjs && node --check src/server.js src/stream-session.js src/zapcast-protocol.js src/logger.js
scripts.smoke: node --require ./src/preload-sodium.cjs -e "require('sodium-native'); require('hypercore-crypto'); require('rocksdb-native'); require('udx-native'); require('hyperswarm'); require('corestore'); console.log('gateway native preload ok')"
